title: Generating a Simple Name
scenario: Write a Python function to generate a random full name, consisting of a first name, middle name, and last name. The first name and last name should be chosen from a list of common names, while the middle name should be a randomly generated surname starting with a vowel. Ensure the output is in the format 'First Name Middle Name Last Name'.
constraints: Must be under 100 lines of code
Must use a list of common names

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the code adhere to the constraints specified?
Is the code well-structured and readable?
